prompt: A photorealistic image of an ornate, extremely detailed key with hundreds of tiny intricate engravings and decorations, perfectly fitting one very specific ornate lock on a weathered door. Beside it, dozens of plain simple locks that the key cannot open at all. Natural light, shallow depth of field, shot like a magazine photo.
metaphor: An ornate key perfectly fits one specific lock but fails on all plain locks nearby — a model memorizing training data so precisely it cannot generalize to new examples.
